full_text:
Cao Zun 曹遵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Zun (曹遵)was born in Pei. Relative of Cao Zhen. Appointed as vanguard against Zhuge Liang. Killed by Wei Yan. Cao Zun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Zun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
